abstracts.abstract: A BILL to be entitled an Act to amend Article 1 of Chapter 5 of Title 48 of the Official Code of Georgia Annotated, relating to general provisions relative to ad valorem taxation of property, so as to provide for assessment of tangible real property used for community housing provider properties; to provide for supporting affidavits; to provide for definitions; to provide for related matters; to repeal conflicting laws; and for other purposes.

subject: REVENUE AND TAXATION
bill.title: Ad Valorem Taxation; assessment of tangible real property used for community housing provider properties; provide

action.description: Senate Committee Favorably Reported  By Substitute
